extortion.description: Winona Powder Coating is the largest provider of finishing services in the Northern Indiana/Southern Michigan region. We specialize in E-Coat and Powder Coat finishes. This is another example of a business that doesn't care about ts employees' personal information. Almost a full set of information for each worker: SSN, DOB, address, phone ... Besides that we have Winona's ongoing project details with contacts and contracts. As well as their financial and accounting documentations. Much to see. You are welcome to check that.
